title: Derive the boundary-cutoff modified shifted minimum kappa_min(r) from trace/volume physics
description: The non-inertial model favors kappa_min = chi_k * S_trace_effective with a boundary cutoff that enforces kappa_min(R)=0, kappa_min'(R)=0. The cutoff must be derived from interface/matching physics, not chosen to produce a smooth compact profile by construction.
